rules.description: In Review Stories & Bugs (pr_approved) → retry merge
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('In Review') AND labels = 'pr_approved' ORDER BY created ASC

rules.description: In Review Test Cases (pr_approved) → retry merge
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Review - Passed', 'In Review - Failed') AND labels = 'pr_approved' ORDER BY created ASC
